author: mkshp-dev
description: Create interactive image galleries in your notes using obs-gallery code blocks. Supports multiple view types (thumbnail, carousel, grid) and both local vault images and external URLs. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: mkshp
manifest.description: Create interactive image galleries in your notes using obs-gallery code blocks. Supports multiple view types (thumbnail, carousel, grid) and both local vault images and external URLs.
manifest.name: Gallery View

name: Gallery View

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Reworked Gallery View codeblock syntax to support a new `sources` + `view` schema while keeping existing gallery blocks backward compatible.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Removed Roadmap from README
- Added Support section to README
- Optimize gallery rendering performance and improve array deduplication.
- Fix syntax and indentation issues in the jules-dispatch GitHub Actions workflow.
- Added attestation for release assets

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ⚡ Bolt: [lint] Resolve Empty Block Statements (no-empty) by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/37
* ⚡ Bolt: [performance improvement] by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/38
* Fix linting error for unused expressions by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/39
* Fix: Use activeDocument instead of document for popout window compatibility by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/40
* fix: resolve issue 26 and implement centralized Logger utility by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/41
* fix: resolve obsidianmd/no-static-styles-assignment lint errors by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/42
* ⚡ Bolt: fix cross-window safe instanceof and migrate to activeDocument by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/43
* Revert "⚡ Bolt: fix cross-window safe instanceof and migrate to activeDocument" by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/44
* Release 1.0.9 by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/45


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/compare/1.0.8...1.0.9
